item.text: {{c1::When you do pre-training}}(hint), you need all the data. So you {{c2::don’t have to think}}(hint) if it’s going to be this data or that data.
item.original: When you do pre-training, you need all the data. So you don’t have to think if it’s going to be this data or that data.
item.chunk_text: But there is another explanation. Back when people were doing pre-training, the question of what data to train on was answered, because that answer was everything. When you do pre-training, you need all the data. So you don’t have to think if it’s going to be this data or that data.
